alt: Crisp close-up of a secretarybird's head showing sharp raptorial beak, orange eye mask, and elegant black crest feathers
caption: The combination of a sharp raptorial beak, prominent eyelashes, and quill-like crest feathers gives them an exceptionally distinguished profile.
acquisitionNotes: Spectacular high-resolution close-up of bare facial skin, beak, and crest quills. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/21/Sagittarius_serpentarius_head_%2815303514658%29.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Rolf Dietrich Brecher from Germany via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
